name: Malfatti Cheese and Spinach Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and remove the stems.
2. In a large pan with the lid on, steam the leaves with a little salt in the water that clings to them, turning them over until they crumple.
3. Strain and squeeze every bit of water out with your hands (this is crucial for preventing the dumplings from falling apart).
4. Finely chop the spinach leaves.
5. Mash the ricotta and stir in the eggs, half the Parmesan, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and chopped spinach. Work well to combine.
6. Shape the mixture into balls about the size of a walnut and roll each ball in flour.
7. Fill a large saucepan halfway with water, bring to a boil, and carefully drop the dumplings in.
8. Keep the water barely simmering until they rise to the surface (they will rise quickly).
9. Lift the dumplings out very carefully with a slotted spoon and serve immediately with melted butter and remaining Parmesan.
